title: Hide Scoreboard
description: Hide scoreboard with one key bind
body:
#
Hide Scoreboard
Have you ever wanted to remove this ugly scoreboard from your screen? Now you can. Drag and drop the mod into your mods folder, then press `O` (customizable) - tada: show and hide.
Singleplayer Showcase
---
Multiplayer Showcase
# To know - Default key bind is `O`; you can change it. - The scoreboard keeps its state for the instance only. It's not permanent! # Feedbacks You can [open an issue on the GitHub repo](https://github.com/PluckyDevv/Hide-Scoreboard/issues) for questions, ideas, or bug reports. I may support more versions or loaders. Express your interest by opening an issue.
